response:
```sql
SELECT s.name, 
       ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT p.screen_pass) / COUNT(*), 1) AS screen_fail_pct
FROM app.patients p
JOIN app.sites s ON s.site_id = p.site_id
JOIN app.studies st ON st.study_id = s.study_id
WHERE st.code = 'MOON-2026' AND p.sponsor_id = :sponsor
GROUP BY s.name
ORDER BY screen_fail_pct DESC
LIMIT 100;
```
